sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: In compliance with Article 22.2 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), and Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we inform you about the use of cookies on www.grupoenjoy.es.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the site to recognise the user, remember preferences and improve the browsing experience. They may be first-party (set by our domain) or third-party (set by other domains).

sections.heading: 2. Types of cookies we use
sections.content:
2.1. Strictly necessary cookies

These cookies are essential for the website to function. They do not require consent and cannot be disabled.

CookieProviderPurposeDuration
CookieConsentCookiebotStores the user's consent state12 months
ge_age_verifiedgrupoenjoy.esAge verification for OutxideSession
__Host-next-auth*grupoenjoy.esSession security and authenticationSession

2.2. Analytics cookies

These cookies allow us to measure and analyse website traffic in aggregate. They are only activated after your explicit consent.

CookieProviderPurposeDuration
_gaGoogle Analytics 4Distinguishes unique users via a random ID14 months
_ga_*Google Analytics 4Maintains session state14 months

2.3. Marketing cookies

These cookies are used to display relevant advertising and measure campaign effectiveness. They are only activated after your explicit consent.

CookieProviderPurposeDuration
_fbpMeta (Facebook/Instagram)Conversion tracking and remarketing3 months
_fbcMeta (Facebook/Instagram)Click tracking from Facebook ads3 months
_ttpTikTokConversion tracking and remarketing13 months
tt_*TikTokUser identification for advertising13 months

2.4. Third-party cookies (functional)

CookieProviderPurposeDuration
NID / CONSENTGoogle MapsDisplay of venue location map6 months
__stripe_*StripeSecure payment processing and fraud preventionSession / 1 year
fv_*FourVenuesOutxide ticketing and reservation systemSession

sections.heading: 3. Consent Mode v2
sections.content:
We use Google Consent Mode v2 to manage the behaviour of analytics and marketing tags. By default, all consent parameters are set to denied:

  • analytics_storage: denied
  • ad_storage: denied
  • ad_user_data: denied
  • ad_personalization: denied

Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel and TikTok Pixel scripts are only loaded and activated when the user grants explicit consent through the cookie banner. Until consent is given, no analytics or marketing cookies are stored and no browsing data is collected.

sections.heading: 4. Managing cookies
sections.content:
You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through the cookie settings panel, accessible via the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of our website.

You can also configure your browser to reject cookies or to be notified before a cookie is stored. Please note that blocking essential cookies may affect the website's functionality.

Browser instructions:

  • Google Chrome
  • Mozilla Firefox
  • Safari
  • Microsoft Edge

sections.heading: 5. Updates
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for legal reasons. We recommend reviewing it periodically.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.content: For any enquiry regarding the use of cookies, please write to privacidad@grupoenjoy.es.
